steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The passage indicates the blank describes something such that anyone familiar with Faulkner would see the resemblance — so it must name something that inherently displays recognizable similarity.

steps.title: Select the word that matches
steps.content:
Imitation (choice C) means a reproduction that closely copies something, so a perfect imitation of Faulkner's style would naturally show the resemblance described.

The other three contradict the admiring context or don't describe something that copies an original.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
